assertions.text: 使用 bronze/silver/gold schema 命名（不使用 ods/dwd/dws）
assertions.evidence: CREATE SCHEMA IF NOT EXISTS bronze; silver; gold; 表名为 bronze.events_raw, silver.events_clean, gold.events_daily_stats

assertions.text: 包含 CREATE PIPE 使用 COPY INTO FROM '@s3_raw_vol/events/'，FILE_FORMAT TYPE = 'json'
assertions.evidence: CREATE OR REPLACE PIPE pipe_bronze_events_raw ... COPY INTO bronze.events_raw ... FROM '@s3_raw_vol/events/' FILE_FORMAT = ( TYPE = 'json' )

assertions.text: Silver 层包含 CREATE DYNAMIC TABLE，TARGET_LAG = '5 minutes'，VCLUSTER，过滤 event_name IS NULL
assertions.evidence: CREATE OR REPLACE DYNAMIC TABLE silver.events_clean TARGET_LAG = '5 minutes' VCLUSTER = default_ap ... WHERE event_name IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(event_name) != ''

assertions.text: Silver 层展开 JSON 嵌套字段（properties:page_url 或 $1:page_url 等语法）
assertions.evidence: JSON_EXTRACT_STRING(properties, '$.page_url') AS page_url, JSON_EXTRACT_STRING(properties, '$.referrer') AS referrer

assertions.text: Gold 层包含 CREATE DYNAMIC TABLE，TARGET_LAG = DOWNSTREAM
assertions.evidence: CREATE OR REPLACE DYNAMIC TABLE gold.events_daily_stats TARGET_LAG = DOWNSTREAM

assertions.text: Gold 层包含 COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) 和 COUNT(*) 或 COUNT(event_id)，按日期和 event_name 分组
assertions.evidence: COUNT(*) AS event_count, COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) AS unique_users ... GROUP BY event_date, event_name
